---
title: "Adaptive Athletics Workbook"
subtitle: Womens' Basketball Statistics
author:
    - name: Ryan Dennehy
      affiliation:
        - name: University of Arizona
format:
  html:
    css: workbook.css
toc: true
title-block-banner: true
---

```{python}
# | label: libraries
# | echo: false
# | message: false

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
from matplotlib.ticker import PercentFormatter
from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))

from adaptive_athletics.data_pipeline import (
    build_player_summary,
    build_practice_summary,
    load_practice_data,
)

plt.style.use("seaborn-v0_8-whitegrid")
sns.set_theme(style="whitegrid")

ARIZONA_RED = "#AB0520"
ARIZONA_BLUE = "#0C234B"


def format_overview_value(value: float) -> str:
    if pd.isna(value):
        return "—"
    if float(value).is_integer():
        return f"{int(value):,}"
    return f"{value:,.3f}"


def format_overview_rate(value: float) -> str:
    if pd.isna(value):
        return "—"
    return f"{value:.1%}"


def style_table(styler: pd.io.formats.style.Styler) -> pd.io.formats.style.Styler:
    return styler.set_table_styles(
        [
            {"selector": "th", "props": [("padding", "0.5rem 0.9rem")]},
            {"selector": "td", "props": [("padding", "0.5rem 0.9rem")]},
            {
                "selector": "thead th",
                "props": [
                    ("background-color", ARIZONA_BLUE),
                    ("color", "white"),
                ],
            },
        ],
        overwrite=False,
    )
```

```{python}
# | label: data
# | echo: false

practice_data = load_practice_data("Data")
player_summary = build_player_summary(practice_data)
practice_summary = build_practice_summary(practice_data)

player_summary["player_label"] = player_summary["First Name"].where(
    player_summary["First Name"].str.strip() != "", player_summary["player_name"]
)
qualified_shooters = player_summary.loc[player_summary["FG Attempts"] >= 25].copy()
ball_pressure = player_summary.assign(
    **{"Defensive Events": player_summary["Forced TO"] + player_summary["Blocks"]}
).sort_values(["Defensive Events", "Forced TO", "Blocks"], ascending=[False, False, False])

reporting_columns = [
    "player_label",
    "Practices",
    "FT Attempted",
    "FT Makes",
    "FT %",
    "2PT Attempts",
    "2PT Makes",
    "2PT %",
    "3PT Attempts",
    "3PT Makes",
    "3PT %",
    "FG Attempts",
    "FG Makes",
    "FG %",
    "Turnovers",
    "Forced TO",
    "Blocks",
]
```

# Report Overview

```{python}
# | echo: false

overview = pd.DataFrame(
    {
        "Metric": [
            "Practice files",
            "Player-practice rows",
            "Unique players",
            "Total field goal attempts",
            "Total field goals made",
            "Overall field goal rate",
        ],
        "Value": [
            practice_data["source_file"].nunique(),
            len(practice_data),
            player_summary["player_label"].nunique(),
            practice_data["FG Attempts"].sum(),
            practice_data["FG Makes"].sum(),
            practice_data["FG Makes"].sum() / practice_data["FG Attempts"].sum(),
        ],
    }
)

overview["Value"] = overview.apply(
    lambda row: format_overview_rate(row["Value"])
    if row["Metric"] == "Overall field goal rate"
    else format_overview_value(row["Value"]),
    axis=1,
)
style_table(overview.style)
```

This workbook separates data cleanup from reporting. The pipeline trims player names, removes blank and note rows, coerces numeric fields, ignores spreadsheet artifacts like `#DIV/0!`, and recalculates shooting rates from makes and attempts.

# Player Summary

```{python}
# | echo: false

style_table(
    player_summary.loc[:, reporting_columns]
    .rename(columns={"player_label": "Name"})
    .style.format(
        {
            "Practices": "{:.0f}",
            "FT Attempted": "{:.0f}",
            "FT Makes": "{:.0f}",
            "FT %": "{:.1%}",
            "2PT Attempts": "{:.0f}",
            "2PT Makes": "{:.0f}",
            "2PT %": "{:.1%}",
            "3PT Attempts": "{:.0f}",
            "3PT Makes": "{:.0f}",
            "3PT %": "{:.1%}",
            "FG Attempts": "{:.0f}",
            "FG Makes": "{:.0f}",
            "FG %": "{:.1%}",
            "Turnovers": "{:.0f}",
            "Forced TO": "{:.0f}",
            "Blocks": "{:.0f}",
        },
        na_rep="—",
    )
)
```

## Most Efficient Shooters

```{python}
# | echo: false

style_table(
    qualified_shooters.loc[
        :,
        ["player_label", "FG Attempts", "FG Makes", "FG %", "2PT %", "3PT %", "FT %"],
    ]
    .sort_values(["FG %", "FG Attempts"], ascending=[False, False])
    .head(10)
    .rename(columns={"player_label": "Name"})
    .style.format(
        {
            "FG Attempts": "{:.0f}",
            "FG Makes": "{:.0f}",
            "FG %": "{:.1%}",
            "2PT %": "{:.1%}",
            "3PT %": "{:.1%}",
            "FT %": "{:.1%}",
        },
        na_rep="—",
    )
)
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | fig-cap: "Players ranked by total field-goal attempts."

top_attempts = player_summary.head(10).copy()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.barplot(
    data=top_attempts,
    y="player_label",
    x="FG Attempts",
    hue="player_label",
    palette=[ARIZONA_BLUE, ARIZONA_RED] * 5,
    dodge=False,
    legend=False,
    ax=ax,
)
ax.set_xlabel("Field Goal Attempts")
ax.set_ylabel("")
ax.set_title("Top Players by Shot Volume")
ax.title.set_color(ARIZONA_BLUE)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | fig-cap: "Shot volume versus field-goal efficiency for players with at least 25 attempts."

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.scatterplot(data=qualified_shooters, x="FG Attempts", y="FG %", s=120, color=ARIZONA_RED, ax=ax)

for _, row in qualified_shooters.iterrows():
    ax.text(row["FG Attempts"] + 2, row["FG %"], row["player_label"], fontsize=8, va="center")

ax.set_xlabel("Field Goal Attempts")
ax.set_ylabel("Field Goal Rate")
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(PercentFormatter(1.0))
ax.set_title("Volume vs. Efficiency")
ax.title.set_color(ARIZONA_BLUE)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## Defensive Activity

```{python}
# | echo: false

style_table(
    ball_pressure.loc[:, ["player_label", "Forced TO", "Blocks", "Defensive Events"]]
    .head(10)
    .rename(columns={"player_label": "Name"})
    .style.format(
        {
            "Forced TO": "{:.0f}",
            "Blocks": "{:.0f}",
            "Defensive Events": "{:.0f}",
        }
    )
)
```

# Practice Trends

```{python}
# | echo: false

style_table(
    practice_summary.loc[
        :, ["practice_label", "Player Entries", "FG Attempts", "FG Makes", "FG %", "Turnovers", "Forced TO", "Blocks"]
    ]
    .rename(columns={"practice_label": "Date"})
    .style.format(
        {
            "Player Entries": "{:.0f}",
            "FG Attempts": "{:.0f}",
            "FG Makes": "{:.0f}",
            "FG %": "{:.1%}",
            "Turnovers": "{:.0f}",
            "Forced TO": "{:.0f}",
            "Blocks": "{:.0f}",
        },
        na_rep="—",
    )
)
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | fig-cap: "Overall field-goal percentage by practice date."

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
sns.lineplot(
    data=practice_summary,
    x="practice_label",
    y="FG %",
    marker="o",
    sort=False,
    color=ARIZONA_BLUE,
    ax=ax,
)
ax.set_xlabel("Practice")
ax.set_ylabel("Field Goal %")
ax.set_title("Team Shooting Trend by Practice")
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(PercentFormatter(1.0))
ax.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=45)
ax.title.set_color(ARIZONA_BLUE)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | fig-cap: "Field-goal makes and attempts by practice."

practice_volume = practice_summary.melt(
    id_vars="practice_label",
    value_vars=["FG Attempts", "FG Makes"],
    var_name="Metric",
    value_name="Value",
)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, 5))
sns.barplot(
    data=practice_volume,
    x="practice_label",
    y="Value",
    hue="Metric",
    palette={"FG Attempts": ARIZONA_BLUE, "FG Makes": ARIZONA_RED},
    ax=ax,
)
ax.set_xlabel("Practice")
ax.set_ylabel("Shots")
ax.set_title("Practice Shot Volume")
ax.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=45)
ax.title.set_color(ARIZONA_BLUE)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
